commands.cmd: audit T001-T008 receipts, Pantry migration/schema/service/tests, Nutrition domain/privacy seams, journal and dirty ownership

summary: Approved a normalized append-only Nutrition persistence slice in additive migration 0016: canonical definitions, explicit source provenance, product nutrition revisions and values, calculation versions, immutable recipe calculations/contributions/values, deterministic selection, legacy eight-field snapshot backfill, integration tests, and native docs. Deferred profiles, permissions, goals, intake, routes, and UI to separately reviewed packages.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit without returning a decision, so the PM performed the same read-only decision gate as permitted fallback.
